0000000100000b6c	ldur	d0, [x29, #-0x10]
0000000100000b70	adrp	x8, 8 ; 0x100008000
0000000100000b74	str	d0, [x8, #0x10]
0000000100000b78	ldr	x8, [sp, #0x10]
0000000100000b7c	ldr	x9, [sp, #0x18]
0000000100000b80	subs	x0, x8, x9
0000000100000b84	ldp	x29, x30, [sp, #0x40]
0000000100000b88	add	sp, sp, #0x50
0000000100000b8c	ret
_apple_re_now_ns:
0000000100000b90	sub	sp, sp, #0x20
0000000100000b94	stp	x29, x30, [sp, #0x10]
0000000100000b98	add	x29, sp, #0x10
0000000100000b9c	adrp	x8, 8 ; 0x100008000
0000000100000ba0	add	x8, x8, #0x8
0000000100000ba4	ldr	w8, [x8, #0x4]
0000000100000ba8	cbnz	w8, 0x100000bc0
0000000100000bac	b	0x100000bb0
0000000100000bb0	adrp	x0, 8 ; 0x100008000
0000000100000bb4	add	x0, x0, #0x8
0000000100000bb8	bl	0x100000c24 ; symbol stub for: _mach_timebase_info
0000000100000bbc	b	0x100000bc0
0000000100000bc0	bl	0x100000c30 ; symbol stub for: _mach_absolute_time
0000000100000bc4	str	x0, [sp, #0x8]
0000000100000bc8	ldr	x8, [sp, #0x8]
0000000100000bcc	adrp	x10, 8 ; 0x100008000
0000000100000bd0	adrp	x9, 8 ; 0x100008000
0000000100000bd4	add	x9, x9, #0x8
0000000100000bd8	ldr	w10, [x10, #0x8]
0000000100000bdc	mul	x8, x8, x10
0000000100000be0	ldr	w9, [x9, #0x4]
0000000100000be4	udiv	x0, x8, x9
0000000100000be8	ldp	x29, x30, [sp, #0x10]
0000000100000bec	add	sp, sp, #0x20
0000000100000bf0	ret
